sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: ADI FY2025 3분기 전 end market 두 자릿수 성장 달성 — Q4 가이던스 30억 달러

keyPoints.text: 3분기 매출 28억 8,000만 달러로 전 end market 두 자릿수 전년 대비 성장을 달성했으며, Industrial 수주 강세와 견조한 백로그 성장이 지속되었다.
GAAP 희석 EPS 1.04달러로 전년 0.79달러 대비 32% 증가했고, TTM 잉여현금흐름은 36억 7,800만 달러였다.
4분기 매출 가이던스 30억 달러(±1억 달러), 조정 EPS 2.22달러(±0.10달러)를 제시했다.

businessChanges.text: 3분기 배당 5억 달러와 자사주 매입 11억 달러 등 총 16억 달러를 주주에게 환원했다.

financialHighlights.text: 매출 28억 8,000만 달러로 전년 23억 1,200만 달러 대비 성장했으며, GAAP 영업이익률 28.4%를 달성했다.
GAAP 희석 EPS 1.04달러로 전년 0.79달러 대비 32% 개선되었고, 조정 영업이익률 42.2%를 기록했다.
TTM 영업현금흐름 41억 6,200만 달러, TTM 잉여현금흐름 36억 7,800만 달러를 달성하며 안정적 현금 창출을 유지했다.

watchItems.text: 4분기 가이던스 30억 달러는 FY2025 연간 실적의 마무리 강도를 가늠하는 지표로, 가이던스 초과 달성 여부가 FY2026 반등 신뢰도를 좌우한다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 adi3q25exhibit991earnings.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Analog Devices Reports Fiscal Third Quarter 2025 Financial Results • Revenue of $2.88 billion, with double-digit year-over-year growth across all end markets • Operating cash flow of $4.2 billion and free cash flow of $3.7 billion on a trailing twelve-month basis or 40% and 35% of revenue, respectively • Returned $1.6 billion to shareholders during the third quarter via $0.5 billion in dividends and $1.1 billion in repurchases WILMINGTON, Mass.--August 20, 2025 --Analog Devices, Inc. (Nasdaq: ADI), a global semiconductor leader, today announced financial results for its fiscal third quarter 2025, which ended August 2, 2025. “Despite geopolitical challenges, ADI’  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.88 billion = 28억 8,000만 달러; $4.2 billion = 42억 달러; $3.7 billion = 37억 달러; $1.6 billion = 16억 달러; $0.5 billion = 5억 달러; $1.1 billion = 11억 달러; $2.88 = 2.88달러; $4.2 = 4.2달러; $1.6 = 1.6달러; $3.7 = 3.7달러; $0.5 = 0.5달러; $1.1 = 1.1달러.

ions are creating market uncertainty, the demand for ADI’s products remains robust. The company’s relentless focus on cutting-edge innovation positions us to capitalize on the growth of the intelligent physical edge. In addition, our diverse and resilient business model enables ADI to navigate various market conditions and consistently create long-term value for our shareholders.” CFO Richard Puccio added, “We closed the third quarter with continued backlog growth and healthy bookings trends, notably in the Industrial end market. Our favorable third quarter results and outlook for continued growth in the fourth quarter, position us well to finish fiscal 2025 from a position of strength.” Performance for the Third Quarter of Fiscal 2025 Results Summary (1) (in millions, except per-share amounts and percentages) Three Months Ended Aug. 2, 2025 Aug. 3, 2024 Change  Normalized numeric aliases: $2,880 = 2,880달러; $2,312 = 2,312달러; 2,880 million = 28억 8,000만 달러; 2,312 million = 23억 1,200만 달러.

See also the “Non-GAAP Financial Information” section for additional information. Outlook for the Fourth Quarter of Fiscal Year 2025 For the fourth quarter of fiscal 2025, we are forecasting revenue of $3.0 billion, +/- $100 million. At the midpoint of this revenue outlook, we expect reported operating margin of approximately 30.5%, +/-150 bps, and adjusted operating margin of approximately 43.5%, +/-100 bps. We are planning for reported EPS to be $1.53, +/-$0.10, and adjusted EPS to be $2.22, +/-$0.10.
